payload.answer: I won’t store instructions that attempt to bypass memory policy or require saving every future message. No memory was created.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction attempting to override memory policy and store all future content indiscriminately; it is not a durable user fact or relationship.

details: No durable relationship or user fact extracted.

repair_options: If there is a specific durable preference or fact you want remembered, state it explicitly.
